title: The Greatest Demon Lord Is Reborn as a Typical Nobody
sourceNotes: LN-based; mapped against the Fujimi Fantasia Bunko light novel (AniList NOVEL entry 113484), which the community sync guides use — one story arc corresponds to one LN volume. Single 12-episode TV season (2022), so episodes are non-cumulative. The anime adapts LN volumes 1-3 (arcs 1-3), heavily reordering and adding original scenes; readers should continue at volume 4. LN complete at 10 volumes (AniList: 122 chapters). Volume 1 (21 chapters) and volume 2 (16 chapters) counts are documented on the series wiki; chapter boundaries for volumes 3-10 are approximate, evenly distributed to reach the 122-chapter total. The side-story volume 6.5 ("The Wonderful Life of a Typical Nobody") is excluded from this numbering. The separate manga (AniList 108441, 35 ch) is a minor, discontinued adaptation and is not the mapping basis.

mappings.arc: The Catastrophe of the Great Hero
